questions.question: Explain the concept of 'bridging the gap' between Service Engineering (SE) and User Experience (UX) in the context of prototype development. What are some of the key challenges that designers and engineers face when trying to connect these two disciplines?
questions.hint: Consider the role of prototypes in facilitating this connection

questions.question: A product designer and a software engineer are working on a new mobile app. The designer has created a paper prototype that shows how users will interact with the app, while the engineer is focused on developing the backend infrastructure. How can the designer and engineer work together to ensure that the UX and SE aspects of the app are successfully connected?
questions.hint: Think about the importance of collaboration and communication

questions.question: Describe the differences in perspective between a Service Engineer and a User Experience designer. How do these differences impact the process of connecting SE and UX in prototype development?
questions.hint: Consider the role of user research and testing
